bio: Pablo was another tricky one to catch – those dominant males! He was previously very timid around the other cats and spent much of his time hiding up in a tree. He was fostered for a short while in 2020, but indoor life wasn’t for him. These days, he’s learned to hold his own with the colony, although he can be a little scratchy, and most of the feeders remain slightly wary of him.
location: Currently can be found by Costa in Cluster P
